pi_items.source: Task description strictly requires cutting at exactly 1:30 (90 seconds).
Task description strictly requires cutting again at exactly 2:45 (165 seconds).
Verified via setup_task.sh explicit sample rate of 44100Hz (90 seconds * 44100 = 3969000).
Verified via setup_task.sh explicit sample rate of 44100Hz (165 seconds * 44100 = 7276500).
Verified against verifier.py which uses 88200 as the +/- 2 seconds sample tolerance.
Task description strictly requires renaming the track to 'Radio Edit'.
Task description explicitly dictates this export path, matching export_result.sh checks.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated looping audio created via ffmpeg in the setup scripts at 44100Hz. The required cut times of 1:30 (90 seconds, 3969000 samples) and 2:45 (165 seconds, 7276500 samples) mathematically match the expected samples at this rate. The track renaming, tolerance window (88200 samples), and output paths explicitly match the task description and verifier scripts.
